_readme: APPROVED recipe: every knob pinned (a later generic-default change cannot restyle this look). starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC.

notes.starless_denoise: off, not vstpost: the post-stretch VST (a self-flat denoise adaptation) crushes this target's object chroma hardest of the class; off restores it at gate PASS
notes.satu: satu ladders were run for the OIII region and NOT adopted -- satu stays generic 0.2; re-judge the OIII region before any new satu hypothesis

approved.note: the post-stretch VST was destroying moderate-contrast object colour across this class; off is the fix
